title: H-A2 revised opening-followthrough condition preregistration
purpose: Pre-register the revised H-A2 condition before any exact replay, paid data, IBKR request, LLM call, paper trading, or new deployable filter claim.
source_decision_summary: H-A2.22 found the current macro/VIX clean-risk split is too coarse. Non-risk losses remain common and 30 of 40 non-risk losing days have negative 5-minute followthrough, so H-A2 must be revised before exact replay.
hypothesis: A macro-conditioned ORB edge, if real, should require both a clean macro/VIX regime and a minimum opening-followthrough confirmation after the first 5-minute opening range. The revised condition should reduce residual non-risk losses without being selected from OOS outcomes.
research_question: Can H-A2 be restated as a narrower, falsifiable opening-followthrough condition using only in-sample design evidence, while preserving chronological discipline and preventing OOS tuning?

revised_condition_design.base_condition: Retain the H-A2 deterministic macro/VIX clean-risk concept as a necessary condition, not a sufficient condition.
revised_condition_design.candidate_condition_source: Use H-A2.22 diagnostic evidence only to define the family of checks. Do not select the final threshold from OOS outcomes.
allowed_in_sample_candidate_checks: 5-minute followthrough sign agrees with the ORB direction
15-minute followthrough sign is not adverse or absent when 5-minute followthrough is weak
opening followthrough magnitude exceeds a pre-registered train-only threshold
skip ambiguous days where 5-minute and 15-minute proxies conflict
forbidden_design_moves: Do not choose the final threshold from OOS PnL.
Do not add macro-event subfilters from OOS losses without a separate preregistration.
Do not treat 5-minute proxy checks as exact 2022-10 ORB replay.
Do not convert this preregistration into a paper-trading approval.

planned_future_tests.question: Which opening-followthrough threshold, if any, can be locked using in-sample data only?
After the train-only condition is locked, does OOS performance improve without tuning on OOS?
Does the revised condition reduce non-risk residual losses identified in H-A2.22?
Is the revised condition logically consistent with ORB as intraday momentum rather than a fitted blacklist?

run_local_revised_condition_test_if: This preregistration validates and the future runner can use existing local artifacts and in-sample threshold selection only.
The runner can separate train-only threshold selection from untouched OOS evaluation.
park_revised_condition_if: No train-only threshold rule can be stated without OOS tuning.
The revised condition mostly removes trades without preserving enough sample for inference.
prioritize_exact_replay_if: The revised condition improves residual-loss behavior in OOS without OOS tuning, but remains under-sampled.
The main remaining blocker becomes exact 2022-10 entry/exit replay rather than hypothesis wording.

allowed_claims: H-A2 has a pre-registered revised condition ready for a local E1 diagnostic test.
Opening-followthrough confirmation is a mechanism candidate, not a validated edge.
Future exact replay remains blocked until real 2022-10 SPY underlying bars are available.
Future H-L1 news or LLM scores must add information beyond deterministic macro/VIX and opening-followthrough baselines.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not claim exact 2022-10 ORB entries or exits were tested.
Do not request IBKR bars from this preregistration.
Do not buy new data from this preregistration.
Do not introduce a new provider from this preregistration.
Do not run live LLM calls from this preregistration.
Do not run live GDELT retries from this preregistration.
future_run_completion_criteria: The train-only threshold rule is recorded before OOS evaluation.
Every candidate condition reports trial count and search log.
Every condition reports trade count, split count, implementable PnL, cost drag, and skipped-trade count.
MinTRL/PSR, under-sampled, underpowered, DSR/search-log, and big-day context are reported where applicable.
Conclusion uses one project label: ผ่าน, ไม่ผ่าน, or ยังสรุปไม่ได้.
The next action explicitly chooses local revised-condition test continuation, exact replay prioritization, or H-A2 parking.
tier_blockers: Future run can be E1 diagnostic only unless exact validation data and acceptance gates are added later
